evidence_label: recipient-source privacy refresh, not treatment advice
source: NCBI PubMed ESearch and ESummary plus current web source checks
current_query: (beta-thalassemia OR thalassemia) AND (HbF OR fetal hemoglobin OR HUDEP2 OR CD34 OR erythroid) AND (2025:2026[pdat])

records.role: current thalassemia clinical-context record; supports keeping biomedical claims separated from recipient routing
records.title: Thalassemia.

records.role: current gamma-globin biology context; supports requiring specific endpoint evidence instead of generic HbF claims
records.title: p27Kip1 regulates gamma-globin production.

records.role: HUDEP2-linked endogenous HbF reporter context; supports model and endpoint source classes
records.title: A cellular reporter system to evaluate endogenous fetal hemoglobin induction and screen for therapeutic compounds.

records.role: CD34+ synthetic beta-thalassemia erythropoiesis model; supports source classes for disease-model capability
records.title: A synthetic model of human beta-thalassemia erythropoiesis using CD34+ cells from healthy adult donors.

records.role: hemolysis cytotoxicity context; supports source classes for red-cell safety capability
records.title: Optimization of the Hemolysis Assay for the Assessment of Cytotoxicity.

records.role: current PubMed heme-assay record; optional heme-safety context only
records.title: A Novel Plasma Heme Assay Reveals Disease Severity in Beta-Thalassemia and Sickle Cell Anemia.

web_sources.role: privacy principle for separating public summaries from information that can identify a protected subject
web_sources.title: HHS Guidance Regarding Methods for De-identification of Protected Health Information

web_sources.role: current HUDEP-2 source context; capability pages can be useful evidence but can also identify a provider or resource owner
web_sources.title: RIKEN BRC Cell Bank RCB4557: HUDEP-2

decision_use: Recipient evidence cards should separate auditability from public identity. Real candidate source URLs belong in a private source index. Public files should use a source bundle reference, source-kind labels, source-count labels, and capability status without naming or linking a specific recipient.
